conclusion: Model healthy in-distribution (MLP FPR ~2%) but flags ~99% of benign IoT-23 traffic as attack. The 2%->99% gap = valid evidence of testbed overfitting / poor cross-dataset transfer. MLP is the clean exhibit; RF weaker (35% in-dist FPR).
scope: One external dataset; window=10 pins Number leak. 'Fails to transfer to IoT-23', not 'never transfers'. Do NOT cite v1 all-attack numbers.
